_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: SQLite Web Manager
author: aetherix@lunexia.com
description:
SQLite web-based manager egg.

Runs sqlite-web — a lightweight web UI to browse, query, and manage SQLite database files.
Useful for inspecting .db files from your bots or apps.

Default port: 8080.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# SQLite Web Manager Installation Script
# by Aetherix-ops
#
apt update && apt install -y python3 python3-pip sqlite3

pip install sqlite-web

mkdir -p /mnt/server

if [ ! -f /mnt/server/${DB_FILE} ]; then
    echo "creating empty database file: ${DB_FILE}"
    sqlite3 /mnt/server/${DB_FILE} "VACUUM;"
fi

echo "install complete"

variables.name: Database File
variables.description: Name of the SQLite .db file to open. Will be created if it does not exist.
